code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  let v = match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end
println(out)
